name: color-by
description: Colour mineblock categorically via 'colorby <attribute>', or continuously via 'contour value <quantity>'. Probed against MassFlow 3D 9.
base_syntax: plot item create mineblock colorby <attribute> | contour value <quantity> ...

modes.description: Categorical colouring by a named attribute.
Continuous colouring of a value with display modifiers.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.
